extracted.title: REMINDER: Operational Alert: Possible Restrictions/ Pre-OFO is still in effect
extracted.description:
As a reminder, this operational alert is still in effect and continues until further notice.

Please contact your Customer Services Representative with any questions at 1-866-581-6487.

***Previous Posting***

Millennium Pipeline Company (MPC) notifies shippers that the previously posted Operational Flow Order is hereby lifted effective Timely Cycle Gas Day, March 3, 2026.

However, the Operational Alert / Pre-OFO will remain in place until further notice.
